h1.visual_description: Large bold Arabic numeral followed by text in a serif font, slightly larger than body text, with significant leading space.

h2.visual_description: Not present in sample; typically would follow h1 styling with smaller font or different indentation.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Image caption; uses small-caps for the 'FIGURE' label and a smaller serif font for the description.
visual_matchers.example: FIGURE 8.7A–C A gazelle horn used in al-Sadu weaving.

visual_matchers.pattern: Horizontal rule followed by small-font numbered list at bottom of column
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Footnotes/Citations; provides bibliographic details or expanded commentary linked to superscript numbers in body text.
visual_matchers.example: 24 For more details on the symbols...

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Foreign language terms or specific nomenclature (e.g., al-Sadu, kilims).

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Superscript numerical endnotes/footnotes with full bibliographic details at the bottom of the page.

layout_info.primary_flow: two-column (asymmetric); images and main text occupy primary columns, while footnotes and some captions occupy a narrower secondary column or specific quadrants.
layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Top left: Page number (e.g., 150). Top right: Author names in small caps (e.g., AL-OGAYYEL AND OSKAY).
